name: 怨念积蓄
description: 任意回合内，任意友方棋子（含带土自身）受到伤害时，带土获得一层「怨念」（最多3层，每层攻击力+2），带土己方回合结束时清除
skillCode: var obito = context.rulePiece; var battle = context.battle; if (!context.sourcePiece || context.sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId !== obito.ownerPlayerId) return { success: false, message: '' }; if (!context.damage || context.damage <= 0) return { success: false, message: '' }; if (!obito.statusTags) obito.statusTags = []; var tag = obito.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'obito-grudge'; }); if (tag && tag.stacks >= 3) return { success: false, message: '怨念已达上限（3层）' }; if (!tag) { tag = { id: 'obito-grudge-' + obito.instanceId, type: 'obito-grudge', name: '怨念', stacks: 0, intensity: 0 }; obito.statusTags.push(tag); } tag.stacks += 1; tag.intensity = (tag.intensity || 0) + 2; obito.attack += 2; var source = context.sourcePiece.instanceId === obito.instanceId ? '自身' : context.sourcePiece.name; return { success: true, message: obito.name + '的怨念因' + source + '受伤而积蓄（第' + tag.stacks + '层），攻击力+2，现为' + obito.attack };
